description: Pre-generated commentary fragments for sentence composition at runtime. Each topic contains openers, bodies, and closers that assemble into complete sentences. 3rd-person broadcast commentary style — uses {driver} placeholder (randomly resolved to first or last name). Incorporates vocabulary from broadcast commentary, team radio transcripts, and coaching channels.
